title: Senior PMO Manager (m/f/d)
required_skills: 6+ years experience in strategy, consulting, or similar role
Cross-functional initiative leadership with clear ownership and accountability
Strategic and systems thinking connecting vision with operational execution
Data-driven analysis and business acumen to support decision-making
Executive and board-level communication and influence
Complex program management with structure, accountability, and prioritisation
Strong ownership and proactivity in ambiguous, fast-paced environments
matched_skills: Cross-functional initiative leadership (HSBC PMO — 6 workstreams; Hapag-Lloyd agile coordination)
Data-driven analysis and business acumen (Power BI, budget variance dashboards, KPI frameworks)
Executive and board-level communication (C-suite reporting, executive sprint reviews, town halls)
Complex program management (USD 8M digital transformation programme at HSBC)
Governance framework design (steering cadences, risk escalation, programme status management)
Structured execution planning (milestones, workstream ownership, dependency tracking)
Strong ownership and proactivity (demonstrated across multiple roles)
missing_skills: 6+ years experience (CV states 4+ years — below the required threshold)
CFO-partnering or C-suite chief-of-staff role experience
Formal board/shareholder materials preparation at listed-company level
core_responsibilities: Serve as trusted partner to the CFO, ensuring alignment and follow-through on executive committee decisions
Lead cross-functional coordination of top-priority initiatives with clear ownership and decision-making pathways
Translate executive priorities into structured execution plans with timelines, milestones, and dependencies
Design and manage governance frameworks (cadences, steering committees, escalation mechanisms)
Prepare concise, data-driven updates for CFO, executive committee, board, and shareholders
recommended_emphasis: Highlight HSBC USD 8M programme governance as the closest match to CFO-level programme oversight
Emphasise C-suite reporting and executive stakeholder management (weekly burn-rate reports, investment decisions)
Showcase governance framework design: risk escalation, prioritisation across 6 workstreams, steering cadences
Position Power BI certification and data storytelling as differentiator for board-ready materials
Frame cross-functional coordination across Product, Engineering, Marketing, and C-suite as evidence of senior stakeholder influence
Address the experience gap proactively — total professional years across all roles exceed 6 years even if PMO-specific tenure is 4+
Emphasise sustainability affinity (VfB Stuttgart KPI framework for sustainability projects) to align with ClimatePartner's mission
